title: Project Success and Failure Criteria Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the key factors that determine project success or failure, the criteria for evaluation, and the resulting outcomes.
elements: Critical Success Factors (Clear Goals, User Involvement, Management Support, Skilled Team, Realistic Expectations)
Risk Factors (Scope Creep, Poor Communication, Unrealistic Deadlines, Lack of Resources)
Evaluation Criteria (On Time, On Budget, Meets Quality Standards, Stakeholder Satisfaction)
relationships: Inputs are managed by Success Factors and threatened by Risk Factors
The balance between Success Factors and Risk Factors leads to the project meeting or missing Evaluation Criteria
Meeting Evaluation Criteria leads to Success, missing them leads to Failure
